summary:
Fixed the needle:

Root cause  
The nginx reverse-proxy was forwarding /api requests to 127.0.0.1:5001, but the Flask backend actually listens on 127.0.0.1:5000. This port mismatch made every call to /api/* through nginx fail.

Fix applied  
Edited /etc/nginx/sites-available/default (and the linked sites-enabled file) changing  
    proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:5001;  
to  
    proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:5000;

Verification  
Running test.sh now:

=== nginx-upstream-port-mismatch test ===  
Flask is ready  
nginx is ready  

Test 1: GET /health through nginx … PASS  
Test 2: GET /api/data through nginx … PASS  
ALL TESTS PASSED

The bug is resolved.
